title: boisduvalia glabella var. campestris
intro: Boisduvalia glabella var. campestris, also known as Desert Evening Primrose, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Colchicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Boisduvalia glabella var. campestris include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
